channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Big bag of recycling, 7th June
item.description:
And the entire street needs cleaning actually Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bayston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dunoed items on April Street E8, 7th June
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped items on April Street E8? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): April Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboards left by the bins, 7th June
item.description:
Please clear the Card boards left by the bins .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food and rubbish being left out encouraging vermin and foxes, 7th June
item.description:
Ongoing issue leaving food out for the foxes on th pavement and this is encouraging rats and the foxes are pulling the bags open and pooing on the gardens completing this on behalf of my friend who does not have access to this service
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southey Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branch overhanging pavement and causing a hazard, 7th June
item.description:
This has been overhanging for at least a week and is getting increasingly dangerous. It’s how below head of an average height adult.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Avenue, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Buckley road near tree at junction of Waterloo passage, 7th June
item.description:
Flytipped on Buckley road Bag / suitcase not sure of contents

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Bus stop K glass shattered, 7th June
item.description:
The glass in bus stop K on Watling street is completely shattered and all over the walkway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watling Street, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.description:
Please clear the card boards .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Tree blocking sidewalk, 7th June
item.description:
Self explanatory, can’t walk here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Uhura Square, Hackney, London

item.title: Garbage bags left spilling open onto the street, 7th June
item.description:
Attracting rats, awful littering

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead

item.title: Fly tipping bed, 7th June
item.description:
Fly tipping and bins overflowing, welcoming rats etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead

item.title: Toilet fly tipped, 7th June
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Young tree ties, 7th June
item.description:
Young newly planted trees needs support tie replacement- bending in wind as support tie has snapped to various trees along at George’s Road. I am happy to replace them all if you send me some ties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped outside garage blocking access, 7th June
item.description:
It was dumped friday evening/Saturday morning Access blocked to garage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mary Datchelor Close, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open bin bags, littering, 7th June
item.description:
Open bin bags left on the side of the street welcoming rats and foxes. Horrible sight

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Roots grown through fence, 7th June
item.description:
Tree roots have grown through the fence at the end of the garden which backs onto the garages behind palace view. This is situated behind 14 The Chase, BR1 3DF. This appears to have been an issue for a while but remained unreported as we have recently purchased the house. What3words location ///freed.herds.spoil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial vehicles being parked, 7th June
item.description:
Large commercial vehicles constantly being parked and left over night. Blocking pathways, driveways and obscuring areas. It’s like living in an industrial estate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit Holders TP sprayed on Treveris Street, 7th June
item.description:
Permit Holders TP sprayed on Treveris Street LP 01 C1 Zone
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Treveris Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crash damaged abandoned light blue BMW, 7th June
item.description:
Light blue crash damaged BMW abandoned in lesney park road by the blue hoarding.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No eurobin for households over shops, 7th June
item.description:
What3words ///listed.grew.cloud There was a Eurobin in this location. At some point ASB last year resulted in the bin being burnt. Since then no replacement Eurobin and waste piles up + attracts flytiping and residents above shops have no bin. Note new development will have 6 new flats facing this bin area with no solution for safely storing household waste and preventing waste littering opposite school and entering the local community area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
